heading: Funding
label: 4609 Funding

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out this chapter, there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for fiscal years 2009 through 2014.

children.heading: Availability
children.label: 2 Availability
children.text: Funds appropriated pursuant to the authority of paragraph (1) shall remain available until expended.

children.heading: Transfer of unobligated funds; reports of use of funds to Congress and President
children.label: b Transfer of unobligated funds; reports of use of funds to Congress and President
children.text: The Board of Directors may transfer to the legal entity authorized to be established under any funds not obligated or expended from appropriations to the Institute for a fiscal year, and such funds shall remain available for obligation or expenditure for the purposes of such legal entity without regard to fiscal year limitations. Any use by such legal entity of appropriated funds shall be reported to each House of the Congress and to the President of the United States.section 4603(c) of this title

children.heading: Contractual authority
children.label: c Contractual authority
children.text: Any authority provided by this chapter to enter into contracts shall be effective for a fiscal year only to such extent or in such amounts as are provided in appropriation Acts.

children.heading: Extension
children.label: d Extension
children.text: Any authorization of appropriations made for the purposes of carrying out this chapter shall be extended in the same manner as applicable programs are extended under .section 1226a of title 20
